sentences.english: I need a lot of personal space.
When people stand too close to me, it makes me really uncomfortable.
sentences.korean: 사람들이 너무 가까이 서면 정말 불편해요.

sentences.english: In my culture, we stand very close when talking and it's completely normal.
sentences.korean: 우리 문화에서 말할 때 매우 가까이 서고 완전히 정상이에요.

sentences.english: If you stand too far away, it seems cold.
On crowded trains, you have no personal space at all, and I'll never get used to it.
sentences.korean: 붐비는 기차에서는 개인 공간이 전혀 없고 절대 익숙해지지 않을 거예요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
